ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric record */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial metric */,
  "tft" REAL /* Total financial transactions flow metric */,
  "tec" REAL /* Total equity capital metric */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the financial metric (e.g., 1 for basic, 2 for advanced) */,
  "cd" REAL /* Coefficient of determination for the metric */,
  "date_collected" TEXT /* Date when the metric was collected */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset class associated with the metric */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the metric */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source of the metric */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the metric for data versioning */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Name of the department (e.g., Risk Management, Investment Banking) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for department inquiries */,
  "dept_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the department was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the department was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the user belongs to */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial metric associated with the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., debit, credit) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who initiated the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES financial_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_classes" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset class */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of asset (e.g., equity, debt, real estate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset class */,
  "asset_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the asset class */,
  "risk_profile" TEXT /* Risk profile of the asset class (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the asset class was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the asset class was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance report */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial metric associated with the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content or summary of the report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the performance report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., monthly, annual) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES financial_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessments" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial metric associated with the assessment */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the assessment was conducted */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Overall risk level (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes regarding the assessment */,
  "assessment_title" TEXT /* Title of the risk assessment */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of the risk assessment (e.g., initial, follow-up) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who conducted the assessment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the assessment was conducted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the assessment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES financial_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., internal database, third-party provider) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., API, database) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data upload event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the upload */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source from which the data was uploaded */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was uploaded */,
  "upload_content" TEXT /* Content or description of the uploaded data */,
  "upload_size" INTEGER /* Size of the uploaded data in bytes */,
  "upload_status" TEXT /* Status of the upload (e.g., success, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the upload event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the upload event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., upload, edit, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details regarding the action taken */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the audit log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., reporting frequency, user permissions) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting (e.g., daily, weekly, admin) */,
  "setting_description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
